content: I'm refactoring the gateway today. starting with extracting handlers into separate files
Good direction. The gateway is at 14k+ lines and the handlers are mixed in with routing. Want to start with the brain handlers since those are the newest and have the cleanest boundaries?
yeah brain handlers first, then session handlers. let's also split the auth verification helpers into their own module

Plan: (1) extract handleBrainGraph, handleBrainTimeline, handleBrainCompose into src/gateway/brain.zig; (2) extract session handlers into src/gateway/sessions.zig; (3) extract auth helpers (extractBearerToken, isWebhookAuthorized, verifyToken) into src/gateway/auth.zig. Going in that order?
exactly. start with brain
Starting now. First commit will move handleBrainGraph + helpers (buildBrainSessionEdges, buildBrainReferenceEdges) and update the dispatch site. zig build test green on each commit.
wait actually before that — did you see Codex's PR on the cell-pod branch?
Switching context. I haven't pulled latest. What's in the PR?
they got the per-user cell isolation working in k8s. each user gets their own pod with their own gateway. it's the canary deploy mode for v1.6
That's the cell-pod architecture from the deployment readiness doc. So gateway runs per-user-pod instead of shared multi-tenant?
yeah but only in canary. shared multi-tenant stays as default for now. cost optimization
Makes sense. Per-user cells for high-value users where isolation matters; shared for the long tail. Did Codex run the polluted battery against it?
no still has to run it. but the spike harness should work. anyway back to the refactor — start with brain
Resuming refactor. Brain handlers extracting now.
actually I realized I'm also hungry. let me grab lunch first. brb in 30
Take your time. I'll have a draft of the brain extraction ready when you're back.
back. did you finish?
Brain handler extraction done — moved 4 handlers + 6 helpers + 3 constants into src/gateway/brain.zig. Build green, all V1.5.1 tests pass. Want to review the diff before we move to sessions?
no just keep going. sessions next
On it. Session handlers extracting now.
